title: Iran's latest challenge to US-backed Hormuz corridor unlikely to change risk calculus
section_path: Iran's latest challenge to US-backed Hormuz corridor unlikely to change risk calculus
section_path_text: Iran's latest challenge to US-backed Hormuz corridor unlikely to change risk calculus
summary:
Main
Last night's attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz appear to have done little to change the risk calculus for vessels fixing cargoes inside of Hormuz. Nor is Iran likely to succeed in forcing tankers to use its preferred routing close to the Iranian coast. Iranian missiles hit a Qatari LNG carrier and a Bahri-controlled VLCC.
